name: Rodimus - idw - Halloween party!
description:
Taking Rodimus (or he's dragging you) to the lost light's Halloween party! It seems strange to celebrate a human holiday, but he worked hard (and didn't tell Ultra Magnus) to make this happen, so enjoy it!

  • Relationship is undefined (friends or cojunx, you choose)

  • Any cybertronian pov

  • He's dressed as a vampire!

    • My notes: It's been awhile! I felt like I needed to do something for Halloween, so here you guys go! Enjoy!

    • Also, art isn't mine!
creator: Spec!
